title: unlimitedVault
description: a mod for disable the interaction limit of vault.
body:
This mod disabled interaction limit for vault/ominouse vault, so you can use the same (ominous)vault again and again.

 
## Features
- **Unlimited Vault**: remove the (ominous)vault's interaction limit.
- **Reset**: For Ominous Vaults that were sealed before installing this mod, these are a special item to reset it.

## Special Item
- **Active Trial Key**: can be crafted using 1 Trial Key and 1 Emerald.
> This item works like a Trial Key. When used to interact with an (Ominous)Vault, it permanently removes the vault's interaction limit.
